metadata.title: Accounting Firm | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered accounting firm management platform for all your professional services — from CRM and project management to electronic invoicing, timesheets, and document management.

hero.title: Accounting Firms
hero.description: Manage your accounting firm's activities, from acquiring clients to handling projects and invoicing, in one integrated system.
hero.testimonialQuote: A VAT closing that used to take 4 days is now done in 3 hours with AdonERP, with a better service for our clients.

serviceSection.title: Smart service management
serviceSection.description: Keep track of each request with project tasks, schedules, contacts, documents and client activities.

accountingSection.title: Next-level
accountingSection.subtitle: accounting
accountingSection.description: Automate reconciliation, manage documents, gain real-time reporting, and keep accounting operations accurate and fast.

documentsSection.title: Secure
documentsSection.subtitle: workspace
documentsSection.description: Keep accounting documents, client files, invoices and approvals in one secure workspace with clear collaboration flows.

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Tools for accounting firms to manage clients, tasks, documents, invoicing, projects and reporting all in one place.

list.title: All-in-one sales management
list.description: Track leads, proposals, and client onboarding from one dashboard.

list.title: Compliant e-signatures
list.description: Collect legally binding signatures on engagement letters and contracts.

list.title: Project dashboard
list.description: Visualize client projects, deadlines, and team workload at a glance.

list.title: Integrated timesheets
list.description: Track billable hours by client, project, and service type.

list.title: Electronic invoicing
list.description: Generate and send compliant invoices with payment tracking.

list.title: CRM pipeline
list.description: Manage prospects, clients, and renewal opportunities effectively.

appsSection.title: One need, one app.
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your accounting firm, client management, projects, and billing.

testimonials.name: Jennifer Walsh
testimonials.content: A VAT closing that used to take 4 days is now done in 3 hours with AdonERP, with a better service for our clients.

testimonials.name: David Kim
testimonials.content: The integrated timesheets and invoicing transformed our workflow. We now track every billable minute and invoice accurately.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million happy users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with AdonERP — the complete solution for accounting firms and professional services.

footerCta.title: Unleash
footerCta.subtitle: your growth potential
footerCta.description: Launch an accounting firm workflow that helps you manage clients, track billable hours, and deliver exceptional service.
